claim_bullets.bullet_text: Now our .iterator() method is returning an iterator object. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.210-211)
When working with objects, we do things the object way. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.210-211)

source_record_text: This section demonstrates how to create a stack object with an iterator method that returns an iterator object, showing how to use the iterator to traverse the stack's elements.
